Name: _root
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT DISTINCT ON ("__cs_join_key", "role") "public"."user_departments".*, "__cs_grp_keys"."_join_key" AS "__cs_join_key" FROM unnest($1::uuid[]) AS "__cs_grp_keys"("_join_key") LEFT JOIN "public"."user_departments" ON "public"."user_departments"."user_id" = "__cs_grp_keys"."_join_key" ORDER BY "__cs_join_key") SELECT coalesce(json_agg("per_group"), '[]'::json) AS "_root" FROM (SELECT json_build_object('_join_key', "__cs_join_key", 'aggregate', json_build_object('count', COUNT("_root.base"."user_id")), 'nodes', coalesce(json_agg(row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) ORDER BY "_root.base"."role" ASC NULLS LAST) FILTER (WHERE "_root.base"."user_id" IS NOT NULL), '[]'::json)) AS "per_group" FROM "_root.base" GROUP BY "__cs_join_key") AS "_groups"
